meta_description: Protolabs is your custom manufacturing resource from rapid prototyping to end-use production. Get an interactive quote with free design analysis within hours for parts in days.

sections.heading: Talk with Our Production Team
sections.text: close Talk with Our Production Team Hello! We just need a few bits of information, and then a manufacturing expert will reach out to you directly to see how we can partner on a future production project. Thank you! We've received your request and a member of our team will reach out shortly. First Name Last Name Company Email Phone Number (optional) Project Description 0 / 255 Which manufacturing service(s) are you interested in? Injection Molding CNC Machining 3D Printing Sheet Metal Fabrication Decide Later Are these parts subject to ITAR or other export restrictions? Yes No Send To Our Team

sections.heading: Digital Manufacturing for Early Prototyping to Final Production
sections.text: Digital Manufacturing for Early Prototyping to Final Production We are the fastest and most comprehensive manufacturer in the world. Get an online quote for parts within days or talk with a production expert for solutions across your entire product life cycle Get Instant Quote Start Production Quote

sections.heading: Our Manufacturing Services
sections.text: Our Manufacturing Services Injection Molding expand_less expand_more CNC Machining expand_less expand_more 3D Printing expand_less expand_more Sheet Metal Fabrication expand_less expand_more chevron_left chevron_right Injection Molding expand_less expand_more Injection Molding Get affordable, high-quality molded parts and bridge tooling within days. With our free moldability consultation, the design and molding process is rapidly accelerated to save you time and money. Learn More Low-volume molding up to 100,000+ parts with volume pricing available—no MOQ required 100+ plastic, elastomeric, and silicone rubber materials Automated CMM for fast, in-house quality documentation CNC Machining ex...

sections.heading: Injection Molding
sections.text: Injection Molding Get affordable, high-quality molded parts and bridge tooling within days. With our free moldability consultation, the design and molding process is rapidly accelerated to save you time and money. Learn More

sections.heading: CNC Machining
sections.text: CNC Machining Leverage the same speed, precision, and reliability in machining that you’re accustomed to at Protolabs but unlock advanced machining capabilities like tighter tolerances and volume pricing through our manufacturing network. Learn More

sections.heading: 3D Printing
sections.text: 3D Printing Want quality parts and additive expertise at a single 3D printing source? Choose from seven different additive manufacturing technologies for cost-effective prototyping and highly precise, repeatable production parts. Learn More

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Fabrication
sections.text: Sheet Metal Fabrication From easy quoting to quick-turn production and finishing options, get up to 500 quality sheet metal parts in your hands in days from a single supplier. Learn More

sections.heading: Smart Production Starts Here
sections.text: Smart Production Starts Here Led by technology and backed by human support, our approach to production manufacturing can be tailored to your project, industry, budget and timeframe. Learn More

sections.heading: What’s New at Protolabs?
sections.text: What’s New at Protolabs?

sections.heading: 24 New CNC Materials Just Landed on Protolabs Network
sections.text: 24 New CNC Materials Just Landed on Protolabs Network We’ve expanded our CNC machining range from 52 to 76 materials, which is a ~50% increase. Browse Materials arrow_right_alt The Next Wave of Manufacturing Innovation Explore how the latest digital technologies are transforming every stage of the product life cycle from early concept to end-of-life. Learn More arrow_right_alt Meet ProDesk by Protolabs Our enhanced digital platform for quoting, ordering, and managing custom parts. Get real-time pricing and AI-enabled DFM feedback, with easy options to configure materials and lead times. ProDesk helps your team stay aligned and move faster from prototype to production. Learn More arrow_right...

sections.heading: MANUFACTURE LIKE A PRO ™
sections.text: MANUFACTURE LIKE A PRO ™ We're your single resource from prototyping to production. Partner with Protolabs to accelerate product development and get to market faster than ever before. When you're ready for production, get complete program management with a team of manufacturing experts who will help optimize your project around cost, quantity, and quality. Learn More

sections.heading: How to Work With Us
sections.text: How to Work With Us

sections.heading: Design and Engineering Support
sections.text: Design and Engineering Support We offer both automated and live manufacturing support. With every quote, you get free interactive manufacturability analysis to quickly improve part design, but if you have additional questions, applications engineers are always available to talk through your project at 877-479-3680 or customerservice@protolabs.com . Contact Us

By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies. Change Preferences Allow All Change Consent Preferences We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below. The cookies that are classified as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site.... Show more Necessary Always Active Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.
